## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Safety checklist

- [ ] This change does not increase pulling force, autonomy, payload, or field deployment risk.
- [ ] This change does not add cutting, destructive, weaponized, surveillance, or coercive capability.
- [ ] This change stays within `RESPONSIBLE_USE.md`.
- [ ] Safety documents were updated if risk changed.
- [ ] Tests or validation notes were updated if behavior changed.

## Notes for reviewer

Call out any uncertainty, field assumptions, or misuse concerns.
